'''gajongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iamb|iamb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iamb|iamb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gajongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjengeth|gæjengeth]] || [[word:gæjengej|gæjengej]] || [[word:gæjengesh|gæjengesh]] || [[word:gæjenge|gæjenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajojongoth|gajojongoth]] || [[word:gajojongoj|gajojongoj]] || [[word:gajojongosh|gajojongosh]] || [[word:gajojongo|gajojongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajongoth|gajongoth]] || [[word:gajongoj|gajongoj]] || [[word:gajongosh|gajongosh]] || [[word:gajongo|gajongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajofngoth|gajofngoth]] || [[word:gajofngoj|gajofngoj]] || [[word:gajofngosh|gajofngosh]] || [[word:gajofngof|gajofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajongotho|gajongotho]] || [[word:gajongojo|gajongojo]] || [[word:gajongosho|gajongosho]] || [[word:gajongoko|gajongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajongoth|gajongoth]] || [[word:gajongoj|gajongoj]] || [[word:gajongosh|gajongosh]] || [[word:gajongo|gajongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajongothol|gajongothol]] || [[word:gajongojol|gajongojol]] || [[word:gajongoshol|gajongoshol]] || [[word:gajongokol|gajongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajongothotho|gajongothotho]] || [[word:gajongojojo|gajongojojo]] || [[word:gajongoshosho|gajongoshosho]] || [[word:gajongoko|gajongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajongothon|gajongothon]] || [[word:gajongojon|gajongojon]] || [[word:gajongoshon|gajongoshon]] || [[word:gajongokon|gajongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajongothoro|gajongothoro]] || [[word:gajongojoro|gajongojoro]] || [[word:gajongoshoro|gajongoshoro]] || [[word:gajongokoro|gajongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
